ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-20-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-14-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
